  P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data,

  group_by(clone_id) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  filter(sum_count >= 5) %>%
  pull(clone_id)

title: 8  108T: Spatial bias to TLS2
text:
9.7 Permutation test logic:
Hypothesis: Our null hypothesis claims that TCR_X is not closer to TLS2 compared to other TCRs The alternative hypothesis claims that TCR_Xs is closer to TLS2 than any other TCR
Take into account the non-independent variable of puck identity by permuting sample label within the puck. e.g. say Puck30 has 10 TCR_X beads, and Puck32 has 20 TCR_X beads. After permutation, Puck30 will still have 10 TCR_X beads, and Puck32 20 beads.
Test statistic: Median distance from centroid of TLS2 of TCR_X minus Median distance from centroid of TLS2 of all other TCRs Notes: Median seems superior to mean in this case If alternative hypothesis is true: small number - bigger number = negative number
Treatment assignment: The treatment group are beads or TCR-containing beads assigned TCR_X The control group are beads or TCR-containing beads not assigned TCR_X

9.10 Calculate the distance of all TCRs to the centroid of TLS2 and add label denoting whether the TCR is of interest or not

# Calculate the distance of all beads to TLS1
tls2_distances_26 <- calculate_distance_of_beads_to_a_point(P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data, tls2_centroid_26, "TLS2") %>%
  dplyr::rename("distance_to" = "distance_to_TLS2") %>%
  mutate(Puck = "P108TA_Puck26")
tls2_distances_29 <- calculate_distance_of_beads_to_a_point(P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data, tls2_centroid_29, "TLS2") %>%
  dplyr::rename("distance_to" = "distance_to_TLS2") %>%
  mutate(Puck = "P108TA_Puck29")
tls2_distances_32 <- calculate_distance_of_beads_to_a_point(P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data, tls2_centroid_32, "TLS2") %>%
  dplyr::rename("distance_to" = "distance_to_TLS2") %>%
  mutate(Puck = "P108TA_Puck32")

title: 8  108T: Spatial bias to TLS2
text:
9.11 Run permutation test

# Save data
tls2.list <- list()
for(clone in P108TA_filtered_clones){
  # Merge distance distributions across Puck 26, Puck 29 and Puck 32
  tls2_X_distances <- tls2_distances_26 %>%
    rbind(tls2_distances_29) %>%
    rbind(tls2_distances_32) %>%
    filter(!is.na(clone_id)) %>%
    # Label TCR_X containing beads
    mutate(label = case_when(str_detect(clone_id, paste0(clone, "($|,)")) ~ "TCR_of_interest",
                                    T ~ "Other"))
  
  # Find pucks in which TCR_X is observed
  pucks <- tls2_X_distances %>%
    filter(label == "TCR_of_interest") %>%
    distinct(Puck) %>%
    pull(Puck)
  
  # Filter for pucks where TCR_X is observed
  tls2_X_distances <- tls2_X_distances %>%
    filter(Puck %in% pucks)
  
  # Plot the median distance of TCR_X vs all other TCRs for each puck
  # Plot descriptive stats of the bead distance to TLS1
  plot <- ggplot(data = tls2_X_distances, aes(x = label, y = distance_to, fill = label)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    facet_wrap(~Puck) +
    ggtitle(paste0("TCR of interest, ", clone))
  
  print(plot)
  
  # Test TCR_Xs proximity to TLS1
  tls2_X <- distance_permutation_test(tls2_X_distances, n_perm = n_perm, tcr_name = clone)
  tls2_X$pval
  
  # KEEP THIS ORDER FOR append(), or the names of the list will be in the wrong order later
  tls2.list <- append(tls2.list, list(tls2_X))
}

title: 3  102T: Spatial bias to TLS3
text:
4.7 Permutation test logic:
Hypothesis: Our null hypothesis claims that TCR_X is not closer to TLS3 compared to other TCRs The alternative hypothesis claims that TCR_Xs is closer to TLS3 than any other TCR
Take into account the non-independent variable of puck identity by permuting sample label within the puck. e.g. say Puck30 has 10 TCR_X beads, and Puck32 has 20 TCR_X beads. After permutation, Puck30 will still have 10 TCR_X beads, and Puck32 20 beads.
Test statistic: Median distance from centroid of TLS3 of TCR_X minus Median distance from centroid of TLS3 of all other TCRs Notes: Median seems superior to mean in this case If alternative hypothesis is true: small number - bigger number = negative number
Treatment assignment: The treatment group are beads or TCR-containing beads assigned TCR_X The control group are beads or TCR-containing beads not assigned TCR_X

title: 3  102T: Spatial bias to TLS3
text:
4.11 Run permutation test

# Save data
tls3.list <- list()
for(clone in P102TA_filtered_clones){
  # Merge distance distributions
  tls3_X_distances <- tls3_distances_17 %>%
    rbind(tls3_distances_33) %>%
    filter(!is.na(clone_id)) %>%
    # Label TCR_X containing beads
    mutate(label = case_when(str_detect(clone_id, paste0(clone, "($|,)")) ~ "TCR_of_interest",
                                    T ~ "Other"))
  
  # Find pucks in which TCR_X is observed
  pucks <- tls3_X_distances %>%
    filter(label == "TCR_of_interest") %>%
    distinct(Puck) %>%
    pull(Puck)
  
  # Filter for pucks where TCR_X is observed
  tls3_X_distances <- tls3_X_distances %>%
    filter(Puck %in% pucks)
  
  # Plot the median distance of TCR_X vs all other TCRs for each puck
  # Plot descriptive stats of the bead distance to TLS3
  plot <- ggplot(data = tls3_X_distances, aes(x = label, y = distance_to, fill = label)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    facet_wrap(~Puck) +
    ggtitle(paste0("TCR of interest, ", clone))
  
  print(plot)
  
  # Test TCR_Xs proximity to TLS3
  tls3_X <- distance_permutation_test(tls3_X_distances, n_perm = n_perm, tcr_name = clone)
  tls3_X$pval
  
  # KEEP THIS ORDER, or the names of the list will be in the wrong order later
  tls3.list <- append(tls3.list, list(tls3_X))
}

10.6 Get TCRs seen near TLS3 at a count of 5 or more

P108TA_md <- do.call(rbind, list(
  P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data, 
  P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data, 
  P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data))

P108TA_clones <- get_unique_productive_clones(P108TA_md$clone_id)

P108TA_filtered_clones <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P108TA_md, P108TA_clones) %>%
  group_by(clone_id) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  filter(sum_count >= 5) %>%
  pull(clone_id)

plot_clones_spatially(P108TA_32_RNA, P108TA_filtered_clones, area_fill)

title: 9  108T: Spatial bias to TLS3
text:
10.7 Permutation test logic:
Hypothesis: Our null hypothesis claims that TCR_X is not closer to TLS3 compared to other TCRs The alternative hypothesis claims that TCR_Xs is closer to TLS3 than any other TCR
Take into account the non-independent variable of puck identity by permuting sample label within the puck. e.g. say Puck30 has 10 TCR_X beads, and Puck32 has 20 TCR_X beads. After permutation, Puck30 will still have 10 TCR_X beads, and Puck32 20 beads.
Test statistic: Median distance from centroid of TLS3 of TCR_X minus Median distance from centroid of TLS1 of all other TCRs Notes: Median seems superior to mean in this case If alternative hypothesis is true: small number - bigger number = negative number
Treatment assignment: The treatment group are beads or TCR-containing beads assigned TCR_X The control group are beads or TCR-containing beads not assigned TCR_X

  dplyr::rename("distance_to" = "distance_to_TLS3") %>%

title: 9  108T: Spatial bias to TLS3
text:
10.11 Run permutation test

# Save data
tls3.list <- list()
for(clone in P108TA_filtered_clones){
  # Merge distance distributions across Puck 26, Puck 29 and Puck 32
  tls3_X_distances <- tls3_distances_26 %>%
    rbind(tls3_distances_29) %>%
    rbind(tls3_distances_32) %>%
    filter(!is.na(clone_id)) %>%
    # Label TCR_X containing beads
    mutate(label = case_when(str_detect(clone_id, paste0(clone, "($|,)")) ~ "TCR_of_interest",
                                    T ~ "Other"))
  
  # Find pucks in which TCR_X is observed
  pucks <- tls3_X_distances %>%
    filter(label == "TCR_of_interest") %>%
    distinct(Puck) %>%
    pull(Puck)
  
  # Filter for pucks where TCR_X is observed
  tls3_X_distances <- tls3_X_distances %>%
    filter(Puck %in% pucks)
  
  # Plot the median distance of TCR_206 vs all other TCRs for each puck
  # Plot descriptive stats of the bead distance to TLS1
  plot <- ggplot(data = tls3_X_distances, aes(x = label, y = distance_to, fill = label)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    facet_wrap(~Puck) +
    ggtitle(paste0("TCR of interest, ", clone))
  
  print(plot)
  
  # Test TCR_Xs proximity to TLS1
  tls3_X <- distance_permutation_test(tls3_X_distances, n_perm = n_perm, tcr_name = clone)
  tls3_X$pval
  
  # KEEP THIS ORDER FOR append(), or the names of the list will be in the wrong order later
  tls3.list <- append(tls3.list, list(tls3_X))
}

14.1 Append dataframes together, replace 0’s with 1/5000 and do FDR correction

tls1.df <- tls1.df %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("clone_id") %>% 
  dplyr::rename("TLS1_pval" = "V1") %>%
  mutate(TLS1_pval = case_when(TLS1_pval == 0 ~ 1/5000,
                               T ~ TLS1_pval),
         TLS1_qval = p.adjust(TLS1_pval, method="BH"))
  
tls2.df <- tls2.df %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("clone_id") %>% 
  dplyr::rename("TLS2_pval" = "V1") %>%

# Reorient beads to match the change in SpatialDimPlot

beads_to_highlight <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
      filter(str_detect(clone_id, paste0(paste0(clone_of_int, "($|,)"), collapse = "|"))) %>%

text:
15.5 Plot clones spatially

SpatialDimPlot(P108TA_32_RNA, group.by = "area", alpha = 0.3, stroke = 0) +
  # Add beads of interest
  geom_point(data = beads_to_highlight, aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), color = "pink", 
             size = 1) +
    coord_fixed(xlim = c(0, 5000), ylim = c(-5000, 0), ratio = 1) +
  # Add outline to beads of interest
  geom_point(data = beads_to_highlight, aes(x = plot_x, y = plot_y), 
             shape = 1, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.8, stroke = 0.5) +
  # Draw median distances
  geom_circle(data = p108_distance_data, 
              aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r = radii, fill = NA, color = type, linetype = type), 
              alpha = 0) +
  # Draw centroids
  geom_circle(data = tls1_centroid_32,
  aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r = 50, fill = "darkgreen"), alpha = 1) +
  geom_circle(data = tls2_centroid_32,
  aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r = 50, fill = "forestgreen"), alpha = 1) +
  geom_circle(data = tls3_centroid_32, 
              aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r = 50, fill = "green3"), alpha = 1) +
  # Formatting and color options
  scale_color_manual(values = c("darkgreen", "darkgreen")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("dashed", "solid")) +
  area_fill +
  ggtitle(clone_of_int) +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none")
